steps.title: Identify what 'an example' requires
steps.content: The task asks for an example of a dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname. An example must show two elements together: a specific nickname and which specimen it identifies.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D explicitly names the nickname Spike and pairs it with the Pentaceratops specimen. Choices A, B, and C fail to provide this pairing—either omitting the nickname entirely, providing no specific example, or naming neither element.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
